Name: Geo Wilson
Gender: Male
DOB: 16/11/1982    Age: 44 Years

62 DAY TARGET: 23/08/2024

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.

Diagnosis: Right‑sided colonic tumour
ICD10 Code: C18.4
Differentiation: Moderately differentiated

Symptoms include altered bowel habit, altered bowel habit, reduced appetite and abdominal bloating for 12 weeks. Additional symptoms include fatigue. Past medical history significant for coeliac disease.

Imaging:
Colonoscopy: tumour at 18 cm, biopsied
CT TAP: lesion in rectosigmoid junction. Multiple nodes, T2, N2, M0
